zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth de Earth於1375年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾薩爾塔申時，她的父親Sir Geoffrey de Earth30歲，母親Lady Elizabeth20歲。她於大約1405年與Sir John Gilbert Bonde在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年在英國英格蘭多瑟特易斯爾 本 普爾貝可享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth de Earth于1375年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾薩爾塔申时，她的父亲Sir Geoffrey de Earth30岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth20岁。她于大约1405年与Sir John Gilbert Bonde在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1437年在英国英格兰多瑟特易斯爾 本 普爾貝可享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Earth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Middle English erthe in the sense ‘plot of arable land’ (Old English erþ).

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth de Earth was born in 1375, in Saltash, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Geoffrey de Earth, was 30 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth, was 20. She married Sir John Gilbert Bonde about 1405, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1437, in Isle of Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.Isle of Purbeck, Dorsetshire, England, U: Isle of Purbeck, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth d’Earth est née en 1375, à Saltash, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Geoffrey d’Earth, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Gilbert Bonde environ 1405, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1437, à Isle of Purbeck, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.Isle of Purbeck, Dorsetshire, England, U: Isle of Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth de Earth 1375 in Saltash, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Geoffrey de Earth 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth 20. Sie hat um 1405 in Cornwall, England Sir John Gilbert Bonde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1437 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Isle of Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir John Gilbert Bonde circa 1405, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1437, nel Isle of Purbeck, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth de Earthが1375年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルサルタッシュで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey de Earthは30歳，母Lady Elizabethは20歳であった。約1405年にイギリスコルンワルでSir John Gilbert Bondeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年にイギリスイギリスドールセトイスル オフ プウルベックで62歳で死去した。

ko.Isle of Purbeck, Dorsetshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 이슬일 프 푸르벡
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth de Earth(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 살타시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey de Earth(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1405년 영국 코른월에서 Sir John Gilbert Bonde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 이슬일 프 푸르벡에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth de Earth nasceu em 1375, em Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey de Earth, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Gilbert Bonde aproximadamente 1405, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1437, em Isle of Purbeck, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.Isle of Purbeck, Dorsetshire, England, U: исл оф пурбекк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth de Earth родилась в 1375 г. в местности салташ, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey de Earth было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Gilbert Bonde около 1405 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1437 г. в местности исл оф пурбекк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
